DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.MeshChannelsCache Class Reference

All getter methods in MeshChannelsCacheNew assume that CollectChannelDataForAllMeshesInList has first been called and the data is already present and accounted for. More...

Detailed Description

All getter methods in MeshChannelsCacheNew assume that CollectChannelDataForAllMeshesInList has first been called and the data is already present and accounted for.
